narrative:
Anthony Elanga is a Right Winger for Sweden. His overall rating of 7.13/10 places him among the top 9% of right wingers at this tournament.

He has been highly clinical at this World Cup, scoring 0.833 goals per 90 minutes from an expected goals (xG) of just 0.158 per 90 minutes. His creative output is notably lower, with 0.046 expected assists and 0.417 key passes per 90 minutes. This contrasts sharply with his club form over the last two seasons, where he registered 0.089 goals per 90 minutes.

Elanga has established himself as a potent goal threat for Sweden, demonstrating exceptional finishing at this tournament. Scouts should closely observe his sustained ability to convert chances at such a high rate. Fans should also look for any development in his creative contributions from the right flank in subsequent games.
